race.comment: GAIL JEANETTE (6) was safely held last time in town against stiffer company. That followed a win at this track at the previous outing. Won't find this as tough so she can bounce back. ROTHGATE (7) was in the placings when a length back from the winner last start at Narromine on heavy going and is down in weight this time. Form at this distance is strong with three wins from four starts and should be threatening. DEION (1) wound up strongly last time out to finish one length adrift in second at this track when coming back from a break. Has the pace to settle in the leading division. Will be in this for a long way. PRINCE OF SEPANG (3) did a great job to score by a length over this course and distance last time out to continue his outstanding recent form. Finds another suitable race and can go on with the job.
